name: Tiered Wine Production Credit

eligibility.description: Domestic wine producers and electing importers of foreign wine. Credits are tiered: $1.00 for first 30k gallons, $0.90 for next 100k, and $0.535 for next 620k.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a per-wine-gallon credit against excise tax on the first 750,000 gallons produced or imported, with the highest credit of $1.00/gallon on the first 30,000 gallons.
